ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "publication_year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "early_access" INTEGER /* Indicates if the publication is available in early access */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the journal where the publication is published */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the publication */,
  "publication_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of publication */,
  "peer_review" INTEGER /* Indicates if the publication is peer-reviewed */,
  "associated_slu_program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated SLU program */,
  "sustainable_development_goals" TEXT /* Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) related to the publication */,
  "ukä_subject_classification" TEXT /* UKÄ subject classification related to the publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "permanent_link" TEXT /* Permanent link to the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* A brief summary of the publication */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the publication for better searchability */,
  "pages" TEXT /* Page numbers of the publication */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume number of the publication */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue number of the publication */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date when the publication was submitted */,
  "date_published" TEXT /* Date when the publication was published */,
  "date_accepted" TEXT /* Date when the publication was accepted for publication */,
  "funding_grant_number" TEXT /* Grant number associated with the funding source */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project associated with the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_publication_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_type_id") REFERENCES publication_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_associated_slu_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("associated_slu_program_id") REFERENCES slu_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the author belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the author */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the author */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the author */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author (e.g., another institution) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_authors" (
  "pub_author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication-author relationship */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author */,
  "author_order" INTEGER /* Order of the author in the publication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author in the publication (e.g., lead author, co-author) */,
  "corresponding_author" INTEGER /* Indicates if the author is the corresponding author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_authors_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_authors_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  "issn" TEXT /* ISSN of the journal */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the journal */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "issn_electronic" TEXT /* Electronic ISSN of the journal */,
  "h_index" INTEGER /* H-index of the journal */,
  "journal_url" TEXT /* URL of the journal's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the publisher */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the publisher's website */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the publication type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the publication type */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the publication type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "slu_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SLU program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the SLU program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the SLU program */,
  "program_url" TEXT /* URL of the program's website */,
  "program_head" TEXT /* Head of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sustainable_development_goals" (
  "sdg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SDG */,
  "sdg_name" TEXT /* Name of the SDG */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the SDG */,
  "target" TEXT /* Specific target or goal within the SDG */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sdg_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ukä_subject_classifications" (
  "ukä_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each UKÄ subject classification */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject classification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subject classification */,
  "subject_url" TEXT /* URL of the subject classification's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ukä_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_sdg" (
  "pub_sdg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication-SDG relationship */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publication */,
  "sdg_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the SDG */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Description of how the publication contributes to the SDG */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_sdg_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_sdg_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_sdg_sdg_id FOREIGN KEY ("sdg_id") REFERENCES sustainable_development_goals ("sdg_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_ukä" (
  "pub_ukä_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication-UKÄ relationship */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publication */,
  "ukä_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the UKÄ subject classification */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Description of how the publication contributes to the UKÄ subject classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_ukä_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_ukä_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_ukä_ukä_id FOREIGN KEY ("ukä_id") REFERENCES ukä_subject_classifications ("ukä_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the citing publication */,
  "cited_pub_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cited publication */,
  "citation_year" INTEGER /* Year of the citation */,
  "citation_type" TEXT /* Type of citation (e.g., journal, conference) */,
  "citation_url" TEXT /* URL of the citation */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context or details of the citation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_cited_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("cited_pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_sources" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding source */,
  "funding_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding source */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Amount of funding */,
  "funding_year" INTEGER /* Year of funding */,
  "funding_description" TEXT /* Description of the funding source */,
  "funding_url" TEXT /* URL of the funding source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_funding" (
  "pub_funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication-funding relationship */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publication */,
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the funding source */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Amount of funding for the publication */,
  "funding_period" TEXT /* Period of the funding (e.g., 2018-2020) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_funding_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_funding_funding_id FOREIGN KEY ("funding_id") REFERENCES funding_sources ("funding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Head of the department */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "department_url" TEXT /* URL of the department's website */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin, department head) */,
  "user_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., another institution) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the publication */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the publication */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the publication */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)
